title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #24 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: of those bastards beating two shichibukal, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I was not given any orders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: other than giving you this report...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Made into Gecko Moria's loyal zombies"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Our one hope was the deep fog...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Can you really afford to waste time...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why is he here!!? Where's Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't purify oz without beating Moria,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: usopp, if a little isn't enough,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then go find a mountain of salt!!!
